stage.emptyBody: Pick someone from the roster, then hit Generate.

rails.noKit: No kit yet. Drop your one-shots anywhere on this panel.

export.dragTitle: Drag the generated MIDI into your DAW
export.exportTitle: Write the MIDI to a folder and reveal it
export.dragDesktopOnly: Drag only works in the desktop app.
export.exportDesktopOnly: Export only works in the desktop app.
export.dropped: Dropped. If your DAW ignored it, record that in the matrix.

settings.title: Settings
settings.showTrayIconHint: Adds Freally MIDI Master to the notification area, with Show and Quit.
settings.minimizeToTrayHint: Minimizing hides the window to the tray instead of the taskbar. Click the tray icon to bring it back.
settings.closeToTrayHint: Closing the window keeps the app running in the tray. Quit from the tray menu to exit.
settings.trayRequired: Turn the tray icon on to use the two options above — without it there would be no way to get the window back.
settings.themeNote: Dark is the default and the app’s signature look. Both themes are contrast-checked to WCAG 2.1 AA.
settings.languageNote: The interface language. Every language ships with the fonts it needs, so nothing has to be downloaded.

about.title: About
about.tagline: Artist-accurate MIDI, generated by a rule-based engine. No AI, no accounts, no telemetry.
about.artistNamesBody: Artist and producer names are descriptive references to a musical style, nothing more. No affiliation, endorsement, or authorship is implied or claimed. Every pattern is generated procedurally from hand-authored style parameters — no MIDI, audio, or data is copied from any recording.
about.creditsBody: Timing and velocity statistics derived from the Magenta Groove MIDI Dataset (CC BY 4.0). Noto Sans, Noto Sans Display and Noto Sans Mono, with per-script Noto families covering CJK, Arabic, Hebrew, Indic and more, under the SIL Open Font License 1.1. Lucide icons under ISC. Preview kits are synthesized in-repo and contain no third-party samples.

bugReport.title: Report a bug
bugReport.intro: Reports are anonymous and never sent automatically. Read the exact text below, then choose how to send it — a GitHub issue, a Gmail draft, or your own mail client. You click Send.
bugReport.crashNotice: Freally MIDI Master closed unexpectedly last time. The crash details below were saved on this machine only.
bugReport.describeLabel: What were you doing when it went wrong?
bugReport.describePlaceholder: Optional, but it helps a lot.
bugReport.composeGmailTitle: Opens Gmail’s compose window in your browser, pre-filled.
bugReport.sendEmailTitle: Opens your operating system’s default mail client, pre-filled.
bugReport.copyFailed: Could not copy the report to the clipboard.

update.noNotes: No release notes were published for this version.
update.installFailed: The update could not be installed: {{error}}
update.footer: Downloaded from GitHub and signature-verified before installing. Nothing about you or your projects is sent.
